Stats.ColumnDef.label: label
Stats.ColumnDef.description: The installed bionic or implant itself. Uses the item or hediff name instead of the surgery operation name when possible.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: body part
Stats.ColumnDef.description: The body part this operation installs into.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: capacities
Stats.ColumnDef.description: The pawn capacities this bionic most directly affects.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: efficiency
Stats.ColumnDef.title: Eff
Stats.ColumnDef.description: Raw installed-part efficiency. A natural body part is usually 1.00. Higher values mean a stronger replacement part, while lower values mean a weaker one.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: effects
Stats.ColumnDef.description: A compact summary of the effects this bionic applies. Only effects relevant to this row are shown.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: consciousness
Stats.ColumnDef.description: The practical part-based change this bionic applies to consciousness. Blank when the bionic does not affect it.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: moving
Stats.ColumnDef.description: The practical part-based change this bionic applies to moving. Blank when the bionic does not affect it.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: manipulation
Stats.ColumnDef.description: The practical part-based change this bionic applies to manipulation. Blank when the bionic does not affect it.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: talking
Stats.ColumnDef.description: The practical part-based change this bionic applies to talking. Blank when the bionic does not affect it.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: sight
Stats.ColumnDef.description: The practical part-based change this bionic applies to sight. Blank when the bionic does not affect it.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: hearing
Stats.ColumnDef.description: The practical part-based change this bionic applies to hearing. Blank when the bionic does not affect it.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: breathing
Stats.ColumnDef.description: The practical part-based change this bionic applies to breathing. Blank when the bionic does not affect it.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: blood filtration
Stats.ColumnDef.description: The practical part-based change this bionic applies to blood filtration. Blank when the bionic does not affect it.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: blood pumping
Stats.ColumnDef.description: The practical part-based change this bionic applies to blood pumping. Blank when the bionic does not affect it.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: digestion
Stats.ColumnDef.description: The practical part-based change this bionic applies to digestion. Blank when the bionic does not affect it.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: beauty
Stats.ColumnDef.description: The direct beauty offset this bionic applies. Blank when the bionic does not affect beauty.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: special
Stats.ColumnDef.description: Meaningful effects that do not fit a dedicated numeric effect column cleanly, such as immunities, abilities, or unusual modifiers.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: content source
Stats.ColumnDef.description: The mod or DLC that provides this bionic.
